title: Uber wants to turn its millions of drivers into a sensor grid for self-driving companies
summary: Uber's CTO revealed a plan to leverage its millions of drivers as a sensor grid for autonomous vehicle companies, describing it as a natural extension of the AV Labs program launched in January. The strategy positions Uber as a data provider for the autonomous vehicle industry while maintaining its existing driver base.
content: Praveen Neppalli Naga, Uber's chief technology officer, revealed the plan in an interview at TechCrunch's StrictlyVC event in San Francisco on Thursday night, describing it as a natural extension of a nascent program the company announced in late January called AV Labs.

zh.title: Uber 想把数百万驾驶员变成自动驾驶公司的传感器网络
zh.summary: Uber 的首席技术官公布了一项计划，利用其数百万驾驶员为自动驾驶公司创建传感器网络，将其描述为 1 月启动的 AV 实验室计划的自然延伸。该策略将 Uber 定位为自动驾驶行业的数据提供商，同时保持其现有的驾驶员基础。
